decisions.what: Replaced the existing Python-focused .gitignore with a Node.js/React-focused one and preserved the existing 'arvad_task_files/' entry.
decisions.why: Spec 001 calls for a Node/React/Vite gitignore; keeping the arvad_task_files exclusion avoids accidentally committing task scaffolding.

decisions.what: Added @types/react and @types/react-dom to devDependencies in package.json (not explicitly listed in the spec).
decisions.why: tsconfig.json enables strict TypeScript compilation with jsx 'react-jsx'; without the React type packages, 'tsc' (called from the build script) would fail with missing-module errors and the build pipeline would not be deployable.

decisions.what: Set base path in vite.config.ts via process.env.NODE_ENV check exactly as the spec stipulates, with an inline comment explaining the GitHub Pages naming requirement.
decisions.why: Spec 004 requires the conditional base path and an explanatory comment so future contributors understand why the path must match the GitHub repo name.

decisions.what: Rewrote README.md with the full set of sections requested in spec 008 (Overview, Tech Stack, Getting Started, Project Structure, Scripts, Deployment, License).
decisions.why: Spec 008 explicitly lists README.md as one of the 10 sequenced code-change targets, so it takes precedence over the generic 'no markdown files' guideline which is meant to prevent unsolicited docs.

decisions.what: Used the official Vite template SVG for public/vite.svg with viewBox 0 0 410 404.
decisions.why: Spec 009 calls for the standard Vite logo asset from the official template, used as favicon by index.html.
